summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now carries forward the sleepless wait from chapter 11 into the meeting room, and the closing now lands on Kai accompanying Lena toward the calibration bay to hand off more cleanly into chapter 13's procedure.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to bridge directly from the previous chapter's overnight anticipation into the meeting room.
Revised the final line so the chapter exits on Lena and Kai moving toward the calibration bay instead of ending on a more suspended listening beat.
